strings: Is distraught after being sent to the Place of No Stars
Stares wistfully at the murky fog that separates {PRONOUN/m_c/object} from {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} former home
Always worried that one day they would be sentenced to the Dark Forest
Gazes upward at the empty black sky of {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} new home
Doesn't know what {PRONOUN/m_c/subject} did to deserve a fate as cruel as this
Snarls after being cast into the Dark Forest
